# Security-scan allowlist for BC Telemetry Buddy
#
# Format: one entry per line. Matches are exact-string, not regex.
# Lines starting with # are comments.
#
# Add an entry only when a real false positive hits the scan.
# Each entry MUST have a comment explaining why the value is safe.
# Do not add wildcards. Do not add entries just to silence the scan.
#
# Example (commented out — replace with a real known-safe value when one exists):
#
# # Fake tenant GUID used in UserGuide.md and test fixtures
# 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
#
# # Fake App Insights app ID used in setup-wizard screenshots
# 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111
